statement: Deterministic / policy-engine generation is itself becoming a marketed feature of commodity tools, so 'deterministic build' alone is not a defensible differentiator for agent-enterprise.

evidence.quote: Agent RuleZ: A Deterministic Policy Engine for AI Coding Agents — framing this tool class as a deterministic policy engine.
Built-in security auditor agent; supports input validation rules and secrets handling standards within governance framework.

falsifier: Evidence that ai-rulez's 'deterministic' and 'security auditor' claims are runtime-agent features, not build-time guarantees — which would re-open determinism as a differentiator.
